features: FROM TIP TO TOE: Baby Dove Calming Moisture Baby Wash & Lotion is specially formulated with a calming chamomile scent to help baby relax before bedtime. Baby Dove Calming Nights Lotion is a gentle baby lotion that soothes dry baby skin from the first use

SAFETY-TESTED: Baby Dove caring baby wash and shampoo formulas are created without dyes and are dermatologically and paediatrician tested. Also, Safe baby lotion that's been dermatologically, ophthalmologically and paediatrically tested.
NOURISHING BABY WASH: This bundles is made with 100% skin-natural nutrients, which are identical to those naturally found in skin, and prebiotic moisturiser to support baby skin’s natural health
GENTLY CLEANSES: The rich, creamy lather of this sensitive baby bath wash leaves baby's skin feeling clean, soft, and hydrated

FOR A MORE RESTFUL SLEEP: A nightly routine of a warm bath with this baby body wash followed by a gentle massage and Baby Dove lotion helps to moisturise baby's dry skin overnight, thus facilitate more restful sleep. Baby Dove not only provide care for babies' skin with baby bath products, but also support maternal mental health by partnering with Postpartum Support International
SUPPORT: Baby Dove not only provide care for babies' skin with baby bath products, but also support maternal mental health by partnering with Postpartum Support International
description: Product Description Baby Dove Rich Moisture Hypoallergenic Wash gently cleanses and nourishes baby's sensitive skin, helping replenish skin essential nutrients lost during bath time. Pediatrician-recommended and dermatologist-tested, be assured that this tear-free and hypoallergenic baby wash gives baby's skin the complete care it needs. Support Skin's Natural Health This baby wash is made with 100% skin-natural nutrients to help skin retain its natural moisture. Give Baby Tip-To-Toe-Care Our Baby Dove Rich Moisture range provides gentle moisturizing care for baby's skin, scalp, and hair. Gentle On Baby's Skin Our ultra-gentle, rich moisture baby wash is made without parabens, phthalates, sulfates and dyes. Care For The Planet As part of our commitment to reducing plastic waste, Baby Dove bottles are made from 100% recycled plastic. Baby Dove Rich Moisture Shampoo, 400ml (Pack of 3) Baby Dove Rich Moisture Baby Lotion, 200ml (Pack of 3) Baby Dove Head to Toe Wash Fragrance Free Moisture, 200ml (Pack of 3) Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 62 4.6 out of 5 stars 157 4.4 out of 5 stars 119 Price £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 — no data Key benefits Gentle baby shampoo helps keep baby’s scalp moisturised and hair soft Gently moisturises baby skin all day long and helps sooth dry skin from the first use Tear-free and pH neutral baby body wash and shampoo Star ingredients Made with 100% skin-natural nutrient Made with 100% skin-natural nutrient Made with 100% skin-natural nutrient Best for sensitive, delicate skin sensitive, delicate skin sensitive, delicate skin For daily use ✓ ✓ ✓ Gentle on sensitive skin ✓ ✓ ✓ Suitable for newborns ✓ ✓ ✓
